---
title: ""
---

```{=typst}
#let book-title = "46歲的人生設計"

// 內頁版面：裝訂 + 奇偶頁碼分左右下角 + 跑動頁首
#set page(
  paper: "a5",
  binding: left,
  margin: (inside: 24mm, outside: 16mm, top: 22mm, bottom: 20mm),
  numbering: none,
  header: context {
    let n = counter(page).get().first()
    let h1s = query(heading.where(level: 1))
    if h1s.any(h => h.location().page() == here().page()) { return }
    let before = h1s.filter(h => h.location().page() < here().page())
    let current = if before.len() > 0 { before.last().body } else { none }
    if current == none { return }
    set text(size: 8pt, fill: luma(45%))
    if calc.odd(n) {
      align(right)[#current]
    } else {
      align(left)[#current]
    }
  },
  footer: context {
    let n = counter(page).get().first()
    set text(size: 9pt, fill: luma(40%))
    if calc.odd(n) {
      align(right)[#n]
    } else {
      align(left)[#n]
    }
  },
)
```

{{< include index.qmd >}}

{{< include 01.qmd >}}

{{< include 02.qmd >}}

{{< include 03.qmd >}}

{{< include 04.qmd >}}

{{< include 05.qmd >}}

{{< include 06.qmd >}}

{{< include 07.qmd >}}

{{< include 08.qmd >}}

{{< include 09.qmd >}}

{{< include 10.qmd >}}
